svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="pi0 Pipeline" id="36Vhq9aOzssyNXzCSUzy"> <mxGraphModel dx="2704" dy="1528" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;" value="Pi0 Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="280" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;align=left;spacing=8;" value="Assumed default config: action_dim = 32, action_horizon = 50, max_token_len = 48. If the robot state/action has 14 meaningful dims, it is typically padded to 32 before entering pi0." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="980" x="280" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;" value="1) Images
3 x [B, 224, 224, 3]
+ image masks: 3 x [B]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="210" x="280" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1f0ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="Preprocess
resize / pad to 224 x 224
train-time aug only" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="540" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;" value="SigLIP So400m/14
per image: [B, 256, 2048]
3 images -> [B, 768, 2048]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="240" x="780" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="2) Language instruction
"fold the cloth."
tokenized_prompt: [B, 48]
prompt mask: [B, 48]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="210" x="280" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="Gemma token embedding
[B, 48] -> [B, 48, 2048]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="780" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f5e9;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Prefix tokens (visual + language)
concat -> [B, 816, 2048]
prefix_mask: [B, 816]
prefix_ar_mask: [816], all False" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="270" x="1100" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=14;" value="3) State
robot state: [B, 32]
(14 meaningful dims may be padded to 32)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="280" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff0db;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=14;" value="state_proj
Linear 32 -> 1024
state token: [B, 1, 1024]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="780" y="635" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=14;" value="4) Action branch
noisy action sample x_t: [B, 50, 32]
(train: from flow matching,
inference: initialized from noise)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="210" x="280" y="785" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fde9e7;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=14;" value="action_in_proj
Linear 32 -> 1024
action tokens: [B, 50, 1024]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="780" y="795" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;" value="flow-matching timestep t
[B]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" x="540" y="915" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;" value="posemb_sincos(t)
[B] -> [B, 1024]
repeat over horizon -> [B, 50, 1024]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="780" y="905" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=14;" value="concat(action, time)
[B, 50, 2048]
action-time MLP -> [B, 50, 1024]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="270" x="1100" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-16" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Suffix tokens (state + action expert)
concat -> [B, 51, 1024]
suffix_mask: [B, 51]
suffix_ar_mask: [51]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="260" x="1420" y="750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-17" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;" value="Mask + position preparation
input_mask = concat(prefix_mask, suffix_mask) -> [B, 867]
attn_mask = make_attn_mask(...) -> [B, 867, 867]
positions = cumsum(input_mask) - 1 -> [B, 867]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="135" width="340" x="1220" y="522.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-18" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="5) Gemma Transformer
Expert 0: PaliGemma prefix stream (2048-d)
Expert 1: Action expert stream (1024-d)
shared attention head space + RoPE on q/k
prefix_out: [B, 816, 2048]
suffix_out: [B, 51, 1024]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="330" x="1750" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-19" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;" value="Take last 50 suffix tokens
[B, 50, 1024]
action_out_proj: 1024 -> 32" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="2120" y="545" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u-_YgGDKv5iOklhHTkPP-20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Model output
v_t: [B, 50, 32]

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 966px; height: 1px; padding-top: 67px; margin-left: 8px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Assumed default config: action_dim = 32, action_horizon = 50, max_token_len = 48. If the robot state/action has 14 meaningful dims, it is typically padded to 32 before entering pi0.

Suffix tokens (state + action expert)
concat -> [B, 51, 1024]

suffix_ar_mask: [51]

div.div:
Mask + position preparation
input_mask = concat(prefix_mask, suffix_mask) -> [B, 867]
attn_mask = make_attn_mask(...) -> [B, 867, 867]
positions = cumsum(input_mask) - 1 -> [B, 867]

div.div:
5) Gemma Transformer
Expert 0: PaliGemma prefix stream (2048-d)
Expert 1: Action expert stream (1024-d)
shared attention head space + RoPE on q/k
prefix_out: [B, 816, 2048]
suffix_out: [B, 51, 1024]
